nl_query: Show the complete question hierarchy for the Data Structures paper, including section names, question codes, ltree paths, max marks, attempt rule types, and group labels, highlighting any questions that lack a rubric in the approved answer key.
failed_sql:
SELECT qp.id AS paper_id, qp.title AS paper_title, qs.id AS section_id, qs.name AS section_name, q.id AS question_id, q.code AS question_code, q.path AS question_path, q.max_marks AS max_marks, ar.rule_type AS rule_type, arg.group_label AS group_label, CASE WHEN ak.id IS NULL THEN 'Lacks answer_key' ELSE 'Has answer_key' END AS answer_key_status
FROM   question_paper   qp
JOIN   question_section  qs ON qs.qp_id = qp.id
JOIN   question          q  ON q.section_id = qs.id
LEFT JOIN attempt_rule                ar ON q.id = ar.question_id
LEFT JOIN attempt_rule_group          arg      ON arg.attempt_rule_id = ar.id
LEFT JOIN attempt_rule_group_question argq     ON argq.group_id = arg.id
LEFT JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.qp_id = qp.id
WHERE  qp.id = :qp_id
ORDER  BY qp.title, qs.display_order, q.path;
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: there is no parameter $1
LINE 1: ...N answer_key ak ON ak.qp_id = qp.id WHERE qp.id = $1 ORDER B...
                                                             ^
